description_long: This sculpture features a rugged, vertical mass with multiple human skulls and faces emerging from its textured surface. The forms are intricately sculpted, with each skull and face displaying distinct expressions and details, giving the piece a haunting and macabre appearance. The base is roughly rectangular and uneven, blending into the main structure as if the figures are rising from the ground. The coloration is a mottled mix of dark brown and gray, resembling aged bronze or weathered stone. The overall surface is rough and irregular, enhancing the organic, almost eroded look of the piece. The sculpture evokes a sense of unease and mystery, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting.
description: A rugged, vertical sculpture with multiple human skulls and faces emerging from a textured, stone-like mass. The surface is rough and mottled in dark brown and gray tones.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the sculpture, with several prominent skulls and faces emerging from the central mass and two skulls near the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a single large skull near the top and another at the base, with the textured surface and protruding forms visible along the side.
description_view_2: This view presents a frontal perspective with three distinct skulls and faces aligned vertically, emphasizing the depth and layering of the forms.
description_view_3: This side view displays two large skulls near the top and one at the base, with the rough, uneven surface and less visible detail compared to the front.
attribute_subject_matter: human skulls and faces emerging from a rough mass
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban area, park, or plaza.
